title: Airdrop
description: A spigot plugin that enables user-defined custom care packages that fall from the sky.
body: Airdrop is a spigot plugin that allows configurable "packages" to be dropped in from the sky. Packages are groups of items that can be configured with permissions and a price. The package when ordered / called in arrives from the sky in a crate, carried by a chicken parachute! See the wiki for commands and configuration instructions: [Wiki](https://github.com/LukeMccon/Airdrop)
